pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; using it with Java 21 causes compilation errors due to removed APIs and incompatible bytecode versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build targets Java 17 bytecode, which is not the intended target for the migration, and may fail if strict source/target checks are enabled for Java 21 features.
